controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - internal ombudsman) directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
(1) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Internal Ombudsman) Directions, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - internal ombudsman) directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2), 14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by june 30, 2026
controls.control_description:
(2) These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2),
14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by June 30, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2), 14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by june 30, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure , by an order, suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these directions, either gen
controls.control_description:
Suspension
(1) The Reserve Bank, if it is satisfied that it is expedient so to do, may, by an order,
suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of
the provisions of these Directions, either generally or in relation to any specified regulated
entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , by an order, suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these directions, either gen

controls.control_objective: To ensure by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) The Reserve Bank may by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any
suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfcs (excluding housing finance company, core investment company, infrastructure debt fund-non-banking financial company, non-bankin
controls.control_description:
Applicability
(1) These directions shall be applicable to NBFCs (excluding Housing Finance
Company, Core Investment Company, Infrastructure Debt Fund-Non-Banking Financial
Company, Non-Banking Financial Company - Infrastructure Finance Company, Non-
Operative Financial Holding Company, Primary dealers, Mortgage Guarantee Company)
as defined under clause 4(1)(i) of these Directions and fulfilling the following criteria as
on March 31, 2025:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfcs (excluding housing finance company, core investment company, infrastructure debt fund-non-banking financial company, non-bankin

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to an nbfc, which meets the above mentioned criteria after march 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting the eligibility
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to an nbfc, which meets the above mentioned criteria after march 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting the eligibility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the nbfc under corporate insolvency resolution process, nbfc in liquidation and / or winding up, or under directions of reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(3) These directions shall not be applicable to the NBFC under Corporate Insolvency
Resolution Process, NBFC in liquidation and / or winding up, or under directions of
Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the nbfc under corporate insolvency resolution process, nbfc in liquidation and / or winding up, or under directions of reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.control_description:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure executive director / managing director / chief executive officer in the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(a) "Competent Authority" means Executive Director / Managing Director / Chief
Executive Officer in the NBFC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to executive director / managing director / chief executive officer in the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure a representation in writing or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the nbfc with or without seeking relief thereon
controls.control_description:
(b) "Complaint" means a representation in writing or through other modes alleging
deficiency in service on the part of the NBFC with or without seeking relief thereon;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a representation in writing or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the nbfc with or without seeking relief thereon

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub- section (2) of section 5 of the credit i
controls.control_description:
(c) "Credit Information Company (CIC)" means a company as defined in the
Companies Act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-
section (2) of section 5 of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act,
2005;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub- section (2) of section 5 of the credit i

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided by the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(d) "Customer" means a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided
by the NBFC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided by the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure to provide statutorily or otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to provide statutorily or otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person appointed under clause 6 of these directions
controls.control_description:
IO)" means any person appointed under
clause 6 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person appointed under clause 6 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure regulatory body for financial sector entities and includes:
controls.control_description:
(g) "Financial Sector Regulatory Body" means regulatory body for financial sector
entities and includes:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regulatory body for financial sector entities and includes:

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person appointed under clause 5 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(h) "Internal Ombudsman (IO)" means any person appointed under clause 5 of
these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person appointed under clause 5 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(i) "Regulated Entity (RE)" means a commercial bank or payments bank or small
finance bank or a non-banking financial company or a non-bank prepaid payment
instrument issuer or a credit information company which are covered under the
purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework, or any other entity as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, the reserve bank of india act, 1934, the payment and settlement syst
controls.control_description:
(2) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, the Credit Information Companies Rules, 2006, the
Credit Information Companies Regulations, 2006, or the Reserve Bank - Integrated
<image>
Ombudsman Scheme (as amended from time to time) or regulations, directions and
guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, the reserve bank of india act, 1934, the payment and settlement syst

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman framework or
controls.control_description:
Appointment of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a General
Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework or a
Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and experience of minimum
seven years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance, regulation,
supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or consumer protection.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman framework or

controls.control_objective: To ensure to relinquish the same before assuming charge as io
controls.control_description:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to relinquish the same before assuming charge as io

controls.control_objective: To ensure previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by the nbfc or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(2) The IO shall previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by
the NBFC or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by the nbfc or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure
controls.control_description: (3) The IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure work as the io in more than one re simultaneously at the discretion of the res concerned
controls.control_description:
(4) A person may work as the IO in more than one RE simultaneously at the discretion
of the REs concerned, subject to the approval of the Board or Customer Service
Committee / Consumer Protection Committee of the Board of the appointing RE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to work as the io in more than one re simultaneously at the discretion of the res concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a deputy general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman frame
controls.control_description:
IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a
Deputy General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman
framework or a Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and experience
of minimum five years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance,
regulation, supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or consumer
protection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a deputy general manager in the re under the purview of the internal ombudsman frame

controls.control_objective: To ensure to relinquish the same before assuming charge as dy
controls.control_description:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to relinquish the same before assuming charge as dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by the nbfc or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
IO shall previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed,
by the NBFC or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by the nbfc or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure
controls.control_description: IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be employed in more than one re simultaneously
controls.control_description: IO shall not be employed in more than one RE simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be employed in more than one re simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint at least one io
controls.control_description:
Number of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman
(1) Every NBFC shall appoint at least one IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint at least one io

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine, at least once in a year, the number of io/ dy
controls.control_description:
(2) The Board of the NBFC shall determine, at least once in a year, the number of IO/
Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine, at least once in a year, the number of io/ dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases
controls.control_description:
IO, the NBFC shall consider the need for
diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly define the jurisdiction of each io / dy
controls.control_description:
In such
cases, the NBFC may clearly define the jurisdiction of each IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly define the jurisdiction of each io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be contractual
controls.control_description: IO in the NBFC shall be contractual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be contractual

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the post of the io does not remain vacant at any point of time
controls.control_description:
(2) The NBFC shall ensure that the post of the IO does not remain vacant at any point
of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the post of the io does not remain vacant at any point of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure designate its serving official equivalent to the general manager rank as the io for a period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
(3) In a rare case where both IO/s and Dy IO/s are on leave / absent, the NBFC may
designate its serving official equivalent to the General Manager rank as the IO for a period
not exceeding one month, with the approval of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to designate its serving official equivalent to the general manager rank as the io for a period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any reporting relationship with the business verticals of the nbfc during the period in which he/she is designated as the io
controls.control_description:
Such official shall not have any
reporting relationship with the business verticals of the NBFC during the period in which
he/she is designated as the IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any reporting relationship with the business verticals of the nbfc during the period in which he/she is designated as the io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a fixed term of not less than three years
controls.control_description:
IO in the NBFC shall be a fixed term of not less than
three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a fixed term of not less than three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed five years
controls.control_description: IO in the NBFC shall not exceed five years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the process of fresh appointment at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent io and ensure that there is a
controls.control_description:
(5) To fill a vacancy, the NBFC shall undertake the process of fresh appointment at
least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent IO and ensure
that there is a reasonable overlap between the time of demitting of office of the outgoing
IO and the incoming IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the process of fresh appointment at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent io and ensure that there is a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed before the completion of his/her contracted term without the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
IO shall not be removed before the completion of his/her contracted
term without the approval of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed before the completion of his/her contracted term without the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform reserve bank of india within 10 working days from the date of <image> such vacancy and shall appoint a new io / dy
controls.control_description:
In case a vacancy arises on account of reasons
beyond the control of the NBFC (such as resignation, incapacitation, illness, death, etc.),
the NBFC shall inform Reserve Bank of India within 10 working days from the date of
<image>
such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform reserve bank of india within 10 working days from the date of <image> such vacancy and shall appoint a new io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the io / dy
controls.control_description:
(7) The Board of the NBFC shall determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and
benefits accorded to the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO, which should be appropriate keeping in view the
stature and position of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be changed adversely during the tenure of the io / dy
controls.control_description:
IO, once
determined, shall not be changed adversely during the tenure of the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be changed adversely during the tenure of the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the competent authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(a) of the directions, of the nbfc administratively, and to the board of the nbfc funct
controls.control_description:
Administrative Oversight
(1) The IO shall report to the Competent Authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(a) of
the Directions, of the NBFC administratively, and to the Board of the NBFC functionally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the competent authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(a) of the directions, of the nbfc administratively, and to the board of the nbfc funct

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the io as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the io
controls.control_description:
Secretariat of the office of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The NBFC shall provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the IO
as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the io as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the office of the io to enable the io/ dy
controls.control_description:
(2) All other requisite office infrastructure, including information technology support
shall be made available to the office of the IO to enable the IO/ Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the office of the io to enable the io/ dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be placed in the head office or corporate office of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(3) The office of the IO may preferably be placed in the Head Office or Corporate
Office of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be placed in the head office or corporate office of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct an audit of the implementation of these directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:
controls.control_description:
Internal Audit
(1) The Internal Audit Department of the NBFC shall conduct an audit of the
implementation of these Directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct an audit of the implementation of these directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:

controls.control_objective: To ensure exclude any assessment of the correctness of decisions taken by the io / dy
controls.control_description:
(2) The scope of the internal audit shall exclude any assessment of the correctness of
decisions taken by the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exclude any assessment of the correctness of decisions taken by the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure handle complaints received directly from the complainants or members of the public
controls.control_description:
Role and Responsibilities of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) The office of the IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the
complainants or members of the public.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to handle complaints received directly from the complainants or members of the public

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal with the complaints that have already been examined by the nbfc but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by the nbfc
controls.control_description:
It shall deal with the complaints that have already
been examined by the NBFC but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by
the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal with the complaints that have already been examined by the nbfc but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent the nbfc in legal cases before any court or fora or authority
controls.control_description:
IO shall not represent the NBFC in legal cases before any court or
fora or authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent the nbfc in legal cases before any court or fora or authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide any or all complaints, the power for the dy
controls.control_description: (3) While the IO may decide any or all complaints, the power for the Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide any or all complaints, the power for the dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be defined under a policy approved by the board
controls.control_description:
IO to decide
the complaints may be defined under a policy approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be defined under a policy approved by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as per the compensation prescribed by the reserve bank of india in its extant guidelines
controls.control_description:
IO shall recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as
per the compensation prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India in its extant guidelines, if
any, and as per the compensation policy of the NBFC, if any, in case there is no
prescription from the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as per the compensation prescribed by the reserve bank of india in its extant guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure recommend compensation in accordance with the reserve bank - integrated ombudsman scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential loss and
controls.control_description:
(5) The IO may recommend compensation in accordance with the Reserve Bank -
Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential
loss and the loss of time, expenses incurred and harassment / mental agony suffered by
the complainant, over and above the compensation recommended in clause 12(4).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recommend compensation in accordance with the reserve bank - integrated ombudsman scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential loss and

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the nbfc, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the nbfc for policy intervention
controls.control_description:
(6) The office of IO shall, on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints
received against the NBFC, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise,
geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the NBFC for policy intervention, if
so warranted.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the nbfc, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the nbfc for policy intervention

controls.control_objective: To ensure suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the
controls.control_description:
(7) The IO shall suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of
complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the
NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have 'read-only' access to the reserve bank's complaint management system to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the rbi <image> ombudsman/ ap
controls.control_description:
IO shall have 'read-only' access to the Reserve Bank's Complaint
Management System to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the RBI
<image>
Ombudsman/ Appellate Authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have 'read-only' access to the reserve bank's complaint management system to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the rbi <image> ombudsman/ ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek such access for the io / dy
controls.control_description: The NBFC shall seek such access for the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek such access for the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure functionally report to the io
controls.control_description: IO shall functionally report to the IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to functionally report to the io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the board
controls.control_description:
Board Oversight
(1) The IO shall be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken by the board to have representation of more than one io or having a system of rotation
controls.control_description:
In NBFCs having multiple IOs, a view shall be taken by the Board to have representation
of more than one IO or having a system of rotation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken by the board to have representation of more than one io or having a system of rotation

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the board, preferably at quarterly, but not less than half
controls.control_description:
(2) The IO shall furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his /
her activities to the Board, preferably at quarterly, but not less than half yearly, intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the board, preferably at quarterly, but not less than half

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the board of the nbfc for review
controls.control_description:
IO has been overruled by the
Competent Authority shall be placed before the Board of the NBFC for review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the board of the nbfc for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed before the board, on quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
(5) Information on the complaints resolved by the RBI Ombudsman in favour of
complainant, either partially or fully, shall also be placed before the Board, on quarterly
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed before the board, on quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied with an analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar natur
controls.control_description:
The information shall be accompanied with an analysis of minimum top five
categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a
similar nature in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied with an analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar natur

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by the nbfc and access to the system shall be provided to the io / dy
controls.control_description:
Procedure for Complaint Redress by Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) A fully automated Complaints Management System shall be put in place by the
NBFC and access to the System shall be provided to the IO / Dy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by the nbfc and access to the system shall be provided to the io / dy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be auto escalated to the office of the io for review
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be auto escalated to the office of the io for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide only three categories i
controls.control_description: (2) The NBFC shall provide only three categories i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide only three categories i

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a standard operating procedure (sop) for flow of complaints and information in a time bound manner
controls.control_description:
(3) The NBFC shall formulate a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for flow of
complaints and information in a time bound manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate a standard operating procedure (sop) for flow of complaints and information in a time bound manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch / unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected
controls.control_description:
(4) The NBFC shall ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch / unit /
other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch / unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed at a fairly senior level, which the nbfc may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of io
controls.control_description:
A complaint
which is being wholly rejected or partially resolved shall be reviewed at a fairly senior
level, which the NBFC may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of IO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed at a fairly senior level, which the nbfc may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of io

controls.control_objective: To ensure be handled by the io/ dy

(5) The following types of complaints shall be outside the purview of these Directions
and shall not be handled by the IO/ Dy.

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly state that the said complaint has been reviewed by the io / dy

IO upholds the decision of the NBFC to reject or partially resolve
the complaint, the reply to the complainant should explicitly state that the said complaint
has been reviewed by the IO / Dy.

controls.control_objective: To ensure advise the complainant about the option of approaching the rbi ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered under the reserve bank - integr
controls.control_description:

the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered under the Reserve
Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time) along with
complete details of the complaint.

Receipt and Processing Centre1.
